concept: Plant / Rooted Growing Life / Photosynthesizing Being
description: A living organism that typically grows in soil, produces its own food through photosynthesis, and cannot move from place to place. 'Phireo' names the green foundation of terrestrial life—the beings that transform sunlight into sustenance, providing oxygen, food, and shelter for all other life.
sound_symbolism: The word grows from earth to light. 'Phi' /ɸi/ begins with soft breath, photosynthesis breathing. Then 're' reaches with extending growth, stems rising. Finally 'o' opens to the sun, leaves unfurling.
grammatical_notes: Functions as a noun: 'lo phireo' (the plant). Takes the vegetal classifier 'lipha' when counted. Hypernym for trees, flowers, grasses, and all photosynthesizing organisms. Fundamental to discussions of gardens, ecosystems, and food.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Plants are the foundation of sustainable life—through photosynthesis they create the oxygen we breathe and the food chains that sustain us.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Plants teach patience and presence—rooted in place, they grow toward light without striving, embodying effortless becoming.
